name: context_mapping_user_id
description: Implement a security policy on the `sales` table within the Inconvo semantic model (`inconvo.yaml`). The policy must automatically filter all generated queries by matching the `organisation_id` column to the `organisation_id` value passed in via `userContext`. The filtering policy must be applied at the semantic model level. Ensure that any query on the `sales` table strictly expects `organisation_id` as the context key.
